notes.title: Quantum Mechanics Basics
notes.subject: Physics
notes.content:
# Quantum Mechanics Basics

## Wave-Particle Duality
Light and matter exhibit properties of both waves and particles. This is a central concept of quantum mechanics.

```mermaid
graph TD
    A[Quantum Entities] --> B(Wave Properties)
    A --> C(Particle Properties)
    B --> D[Interference]
    C --> E[Photoelectric Effect]
```

notes.title: Medical Anatomy - Heart
notes.subject: Biology
notes.content:
# The Human Heart

> [!NOTE]
> The heart is a muscular organ about the size of a fist, located just behind and slightly left of the breastbone.

## Structure
- Right Atrium
- Right Ventricle
- Left Atrium
- Left Ventricle

flashcards.back: The concept that quantum entities exhibit properties of both waves and particles.
